title: Daewoo 1.7L Electric Kettle – Fast Boil, Lightweight Plastic, 2200W Power, Auto Shut Off, Boil Dry Protection, White Jug Kettle for Home, Office, Dorm
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: FAST BOIL TECHNOLOGY – Enjoy your favourite hot drinks in minutes with the powerful 2200W heating element, designed for quick and efficient boiling – ideal for busy mornings and office breaks
LARGE 1.7L CAPACITY – Perfect for families, students, and shared spaces, this jug kettle easily boils enough water for multiple cups of tea, coffee, or instant meals in one go
SAFE AND RELIABLE DESIGN – Featuring boil dry protection, automatic shut-off, and a cool-touch handle, ensuring peace of mind while making hot drinks for the whole family
STYLISH & LIGHTWEIGHT – Crafted in durable, white plastic with a clear water gauge, this sleek kettle fits effortlessly into any kitchen, dorm room, or office setup
EASY TO USE AND CLEAN – Equipped with a removable filter, one-touch lid, corded base with cord storage, and easy wipe-clean surfaces for hassle-free daily use and maintenance

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎1.7 Litre Capacity, Base Cord Storage, Cordless Kettle, Extra Wide Opening Lid, Water Level Indicator, LED Light, Removable Filter, Part of a collection for mix and match
